channel.title: Ai-Development on Maven AI
channel.description: Recent content in Ai-Development on Maven AI

item.title: The Skills Architecture: How We Built 30 Principal-Level Specialists
item.description: A technical deep dive into how we structured, documented, and organized 30 principal-level skills for building world-class SaaS products.

item.title: Building a Complete Product Company in One Day: 30 Principal-Level Skills
item.description: From zero to a complete 30-skill product company in 11 hours. Strategy, design, engineering, quality, growth, and governance—everything needed to build world-class SaaS products.
